summary: Off-by-one Schengen display fix verified end-to-end. Jest suite: 4 suites / 35 tests passed (including the new userScenario_july14.test.ts). Live browser test on Expo web preview (mobile viewport 390x844) with the exact user seed (Portugal open-ended visit entryDate=2026-07-11, today=2026-07-14 confirmed by sandbox date): both the mini map card at the top AND the Schengen 90/180 Calculator section show '4 DAYS USED / 86 YOU CAN STAY / Oct 8 UNTIL'. The value '87' is NOT present anywhere on the page. 'Until' date is Oct 8, 2026 (unchanged, uses raw engine value). Regression case (Vietnam-only non-Schengen visit): Schengen calculator widget is correctly hidden, Active Visas widget shown instead, no crash, no spurious -1 subtraction. All five other tabs (visits, Calendar, Map, Tax, Profile) load without crash. Backend /api/health returns healthy. Only console noise is the pre-existing warnings already documented in iteration_2 (shadow*, props.pointerEvents, expo-notifications web listener, iframe sandbox, and the pre-existing 'Unexpected text node' on visit detail screen) — none introduced by this fix. Fix is display-layer only in index.tsx and MiniMapCard.tsx; engine schengenEngine.ts untouched as intended. Written in a supportive, factual tone per user context note.

react_native_issues.component: Pre-existing (documented in iteration_2, not caused by this iteration)
react_native_issues.issue: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>' fires when navigating to Visits list. Non-blocking. Reference: /app/frontend/app/visit/[id].tsx
shadow* and props.pointerEvents deprecation warnings across screens. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: index.tsx L130-132: canStayDays = isCurrentlyInSchengen ? Math.max(0, rawMaxStay - 1) : rawMaxStay. stayUntilDate uses rawMaxStay - 1 unconditionally, which is correct because when NOT in Schengen, rawMaxStay represents days starting today, so today+rawMaxStay-1 is still the last day of the hypothetical stay. Clean.
MiniMapCard.tsx L54-58: mirrors the same display contract based on isSchengenCounting. Both surfaces reach the same value (86) for the seeded scenario — no divergence.
userScenario_july14.test.ts pins both the engine contract (maxStayFromToday=87) and the display contract (86 when currently in Schengen, raw when not). Good regression guard.
Engine (schengenEngine.ts) untouched — respects the 'display-layer only' intent stated in the request.

isCurrentlyInSchengen and isSchengenCounting are computed with the same predicate chain (isCurrentVisit && isSchengenCountry && countsAgainstSchengen && visitCountsForSchengen), so the two surfaces stay in sync.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (primary + regression + tab-load all pass; 35/35 Jest tests pass)

seed_data_creation: Primary: @nomad_visits = [{PT, entry 2026-07-11, open-ended, Schengen C (Short Stay)}], @nomad_profile = {passports:[], insurances:[]}. Regression: @nomad_visits = [{VN, entry 2026-06-13, exit 2026-07-10, Tourist}].
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sandbox date is 2026-07-14. Frontend env var is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Public URL: https://nomad-compass-6.preview.emergentagent.com. Seed key '@nomad_visits' (Visit[]) + '@nomad_profile' (must include passports:[] and insurances:[]). The display fix is in index.tsx L130-132 and MiniMapCard.tsx L54-58 (subtract 1 from maxStayFromToday when the user is currently inside Schengen on a counting visit). Engine untouched — do not expect changes in schengenEngine.ts.
rca_of_issue: N/A — fix verified working. Root cause of the original off-by-one (documented for context): engine's calculateMaxStay counts today (dayOffset 0 = today) as an available day when projecting forward, but daysUsed also counts today for an active visit. When both are shown side-by-side the user perceives a double-count of today. Fix subtracts 1 from displayed maxStay only when the user is currently inside Schengen on a counting visit; stayUntilDate correctly keeps using the raw value so today + (raw - 1) = correct last legal day (Oct 8).
